benefit: Users instantly know if their weight falls within a healthy range for their height, giving a quick baseline for health awareness without needing a doctor visit.
Users get an exact daily calorie target based on age, weight, height, and activity level, removing the guesswork from fat loss or muscle gain plans.
Users see the precise protein, carb, and fat split for their goal, so every meal can be structured to support body composition changes efficiently.
Users measure actual fat versus lean mass, giving a far more accurate picture of fitness progress than scale weight alone.
Users get a science-backed healthy weight range for their height and frame, providing a realistic and motivating goal to work toward.
Users discover their five personalized training zones by age and resting heart rate, enabling them to exercise at the right intensity for fat burn, endurance, or peak performance.
Users receive a daily hydration target tailored to their body weight and activity level, reducing fatigue and improving focus caused by chronic underhydration.
Users find optimal bedtimes or wake times aligned to 90-minute sleep cycles, so they wake feeling rested rather than groggy mid-cycle.
Users estimate their BAC based on drinks consumed, body weight, and time elapsed, enabling safer decisions around driving or continued drinking.
Users predict their fertile window or estimated birth date using their cycle data, giving clear, actionable timelines for family planning without a clinical appointment.
